title: Long To Cards
summary: Transform long-form material into standard card packages and hand publish-ready work to real image production.
user_needs: turn a long article into social cards
convert notes or transcripts into carousel copy
create card-by-card visual and copy guidance
preserve source claims while adapting for skimmable formats
generate platform captions and freshness-aware topic tags
hand publish-ready Xiaohongshu, WeChat, Zhihu Idea, or generic cards to image production
